system.description: Injectors carried by the Adeptus Astartes are usually hyposprays that require helmets to be removed so that skin contact can be made. An injector can hold a single dose of any drug (or toxin), which a character may administer as a Full Action. An injector may be used on an unwilling target through standard melee combat rules as though it were a weapon, but the injector itself deals no Damage and cannot penetrate armour.
